title: Demo vertical slice (Tier A)
description: Playable zip path: hub → narrative → combat → victory → hub. Depends on ui-shell, map-progression, narrative, save-system, scenes, combat-core. Automated coverage: PlayMode/EditMode tests listed per node; full loop timing and victory Continue → map remain manual per DEMO_RUN.md.

nodes.title: Main scene map bootstraps at tour
nodes.description: Given Main.unity loads with main menu skipped for tests, when WorldMapManager finishes lazy init, then CurrentLocation.LocationId equals GameWorldConstants.DefaultStartLocationId (tour). Covered by DemoVerticalSlicePlayModeTests.MainScene_SkipMenu_CurrentLocationId_IsTour.

nodes.title: Tour location lists Fair Field as next
nodes.description: Given Loc_tour asset, when NextLocationIds is read, then it contains GameWorldConstants.PlayableSliceFirstCombatLocationId (fayre_felde). Covered by PlayableSliceEditModeTests.PlayableSlice_Tour_ListsFayreFeldeAsNext.

nodes.title: Fair Field encounter wired to False
nodes.description: Given Loc_fayre_felde asset, when encounter config is inspected, then combat can start with expected slice enemy (False). Covered by PlayableSliceEditModeTests.PlayableSlice_FayreFelde_HasEncounter_WithFalseEnemy and PlayableSliceConstants_FirstCombatLocation_MatchesFayreFeldeAsset.

nodes.title: Save checkpoint updates current location
nodes.description: Given SaveManager after NewGame, when SaveCheckpoint(fayre_felde) is called, then CurrentProgress.CurrentLocationId is fayre_felde and location is visited/unlocked. Covered by MapSaveTest.SaveCheckpoint_UpdatesLocationAndUnlocks.

nodes.title: Game progress JSON roundtrip
nodes.description: Given GameProgress with visited/unlocked locations, when ToJson then FromJson, then fields match. Supports save/load integrity for slice. Covered by MapSaveTest.GameProgress_ToJsonFromJson_Roundtrips.

nodes.title: Pause overlay present after bootstrap
nodes.description: Given Main.unity with GameFlowController, when UI is built, then a PauseRoot exists under the menu canvas and starts inactive (Escape opens pause in play). Covered by DemoVerticalSlicePlayModeTests.MainScene_SkipMenu_PauseRoot_ExistsAndStartsHidden.

nodes.title: Settings master volume persists
nodes.description: Given KyndeBladeSettingsStore, when MasterVolume is set, then PlayerPrefs reflects the value. Covered by UiShellEditModeTests.KyndeBladeSettingsStore_MasterVolume_Persists.

nodes.title: Continue when save exists
nodes.description: Given PlayerPrefs contains KyndeBlade save JSON, when SaveManager loads, then HasSavedGame is true. Covered by UiShellEditModeTests.SaveManager_HasSavedGame_TrueWhenPrefsContainSave.

nodes.title: Combat win Continue returns to map (manual)
nodes.description: Manual smoke: from Fair Field combat, on victory tap Continue and confirm map shows Fair Field as current and next locations match design. See DEMO_RUN.md table. Automated: ParryDodgeInputHandler and combat stack covered separately under combat-* workflows.
